_comment: This file is shared by all three services (web/worker/beat), so nothing service-specific belongs here. Set healthcheckPath=/api/health on the WEB service only, in its dashboard settings — worker/beat expose no port and a healthcheck would fail their deploys. The preDeployCommand is gated to web for the same reason (ungated, three services race migrate against one Postgres).

deploy.preDeployCommand: sh -c 'if [ "$PROCESS" = web ]; then python manage.py migrate --noinput; fi'
